paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.62, representing a decrease of 0.45% from the prior close and 26.2% over the last 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines are focused on the company's announcement of its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, scheduled for August 13, 2026, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. There are also discussions about the company's completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and its potential impact on the stock price.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
